description: 18.04 lets a unit that disembarks from a STATIONARY transport make 'a normal or advance move'. This drives the live UI: disembark the Kommandos from the unmoved Battlewagon, then pick 'Advance (roll D6)' on the new PostDisembarkMoveDialog. The engine rolls the advance die (pausing for the standard Command Re-roll, which is declined), and the unit ends up in an ADVANCE move — flagged advanced, with a move cap of M + D6 (greater than its plain 6").

steps.comment: Decline the Command Re-roll offered on the advance roll (standard advance flow). Tolerant if no reroll was offered.
The disembarked unit made an ADVANCE — advanced flag set (no shoot/charge this turn).
Advance cap = M(6") + D6, strictly greater than the plain 6" normal move.
